briefs.tldr: **v3 shipped today.** Apple-minimal redesign with auto-OS theme + toggle. Four inner-page sections live: [Papers](./section.html?kind=papers), [Learning](./section.html?kind=learning), [Projects](./section.html?kind=projects), [Experiments](./section.html?kind=experiments). New [Feedback](./feedback.html) page. Decisions D004–D009 locked in. Cron infra lands next.
briefs.tldr_short: v3 shipped. Apple theme, 4 inner sections, /feedback. Next: cron infra for 24/7 workflow.
